title: variational-sparse-hpo: companion code for "A Variational Analysis Approach for Bilevel Hyperparameter Optimization with Sparse Regularization"
description:
Reproducible companion code for the paper A Variational Analysis Approach for Bilevel Hyperparameter Optimization with Sparse Regularization (Computational Optimization and Applications, Special Issue on Machine Learning and Optimization).

The core library is a self-contained fork of QB3/sparse-ho (BSD-3-Clause) extended with: weighted per-feature sparse models (WeightedElasticNet, WeightedSparseLogReg); a support-reduced variational hypergradient (ImplicitVariational) with sign-consistent / biactive-set selection; and nonsmooth outer optimizers (trust-region NTRBA and normalized subgradient NBA). The repository reproduces every figure and table in the paper's numerical section.
